---
title: "Contact"
---

## Curriculum Vitae

You can download my current CV below.

##### [Download CV (PDF)](Profile.pdf)

## Education

- **RMIT University**  
  Doctor of Philosophy (Psychology)

- **Victoria University**  
  Master of Professional Psychology

- **Victoria University**  
  Bachelor of Psychology (Honours)

## Current appointments

- PhD Candidate, RMIT University
- Provisional Psychologist
- School Counsellor
- Sessional Academic

---
title: "Get in touch"
---

## Contact

**Email**\
[connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com](mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com)

For research, teaching, clinical, or professional enquiries, email is the best point of contact. I aim to respond within a few business days.

---

## Current appointments

| Role | Organisation |
|---|---|
| PhD Candidate | RMIT University |
| Provisional Psychologist | CatholicCare Victoria |
| School Counsellor | Sacred Heart Primary School, Kew |
| Sessional Academic | RMIT University |
| Associate Lecturer | Cairnmillar Institute |

---

## Academic profiles

- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/connorconkeymorrison)

---

## Curriculum Vitae

[Download CV (PDF)](Profile.pdf)
